commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=c114a56ff06dfb9235f36239272839b807b95aa4)
commands.review_summary:
This PR suppresses or clears acknowledgement-only `HEARTBEAT_OK` heartbeat pending final-delivery state, preserves real heartbeat content, adjusts the heartbeat defer check, and adds regression tests plus a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible. The linked report gives deterministic v2026.5.7 steps, and current main source shows the pending write, heartbeat replay attempt update, and defer-window loop; I did not run a live gateway reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: The PR needs contributor follow-up for both the remaining `ackMaxChars` cleanup bug and real behavior proof; automation should not take over while the proof gate is unsatisfied.

target.title: fix(heartbeat): skip pendingFinalDelivery when reply strips to HEARTBEAT_OK
target.author: hclsys

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge

commands.author: hclsys
commands.command: p2 fix pushed (c114a56ff0). **p2 finding addressed:** `shouldskipheartbeatpendingfinaldelivery` used the fixed default `ackmaxchars=300` instead of the resolved per-agent config value. **changes in this push:** 1. **`agent-runner.ts`** — replaced `shouldskipheartbeatpendingfinaldelivery` with inline logic that resolves `ackmaxchars` via `resolveagentconfig(cfg, agentid)?.heartbeat?.ackmaxchars ?? cfg.agents?.defaults?.heartbeat?.ackmaxchars ?? default_heartbeat_ack_max_chars`. used `resolveagentconfig` (same helper used in `heartbeat-runner.ts`) to avoid unsafe string indexing on `agentsconfig`. 2. **`agent-runner.ts`** — additionally: the write now saves `resolvedpendingtext` (the stripped remainder after heartbeat_ok) instead of raw `pendingtext`. previously `pendingfinaldeliverytext` would have contained the `heartbeat_ok` prefix. 3. **`agent-runner.runreplyagent.e2e.test.ts`** — new test: heartbeat response `heartbeat_ok <360-char remainder>` produces `pendingfinaldelivery: true` and `pendingfinaldeliverytext` equal to the remainder (without token prefix). passes in full suite (35/35). **real behavior proof (p2-level):** ```bash # typescript compile: only pre-existing attempt.test.ts error (unrelated, already on main) node --max-old-space-size=8192 node_modules/.bin/tsc --noemit # → src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/attempt.test.ts(178,20): error ts2352 [pre-existing] # all 35 e2e tests pass npx vitest run "agent-runner.runreplyagent" --config test/vitest/vitest.e2e.config.ts --reporter=dot # → tests 35 passed (35) ``` **ackmaxchars threading verification:** with `agentid=undefined` (no per-agent override), `heartbeatackmaxchars` resolves to `cfg.agents?.defaults?.heartbeat?.ackmaxchars ?? default_heartbeat_ack_max_chars = 300`. the 360-char test remainder exceeds 300 → `shouldskip: false` → persisted. an agent configured with `ackmaxchars: 0` would persist even a single-char remainder. <!-- clawsweeper-command-progress:start --> re-review progress: - state: review in progress - detail: targeted re-review run started; codex is reviewing the item. - run: https://github.com/openclaw/clawsweeper/actions/runs/25541075392 - updated: 2026-05-08t06:38:18.542z <!-- clawsweeper-command-progress:end -->
commands.freeform_prompt: P2 fix pushed (c114a56ff0). **P2 finding addressed:** `shouldSkipHeartbeatPendingFinalDelivery` used the fixed default `ackMaxChars=300` instead of the resolved per-agent config value. **Changes in this push:** 1. **`agent-runner.ts`** — replaced `shouldSkipHeartbeatPendingFinalDelivery` with inline logic that resolves `ackMaxChars` via `resolveAgentConfig(cfg, agentId)?.heartbeat?.ackMaxChars ?? cfg.agents?.defaults?.heartbeat?.ackMaxChars ?? DEFAULT_HEARTBEAT_ACK_MAX_CHARS`. Used `resolveAgentConfig` (same helper used in `heartbeat-runner.ts`) to avoid unsafe string indexing on `AgentsConfig`. 2. **`agent-runner.ts`** — additionally: the write now saves `resolvedPendingText` (the stripped remainder after HEARTBEAT_OK) instead of raw `pendingText`. Previously `pendingFinalDeliveryText` would have contained the `HEARTBEAT_OK` prefix. 3. **`agent-runner.runreplyagent.e2e.test.ts`** — new test: heartbeat response `HEARTBEAT_OK <360-char remainder>` produces `pendingFinalDelivery: true` and `pendingFinalDeliveryText` equal to the remainder (without token prefix). Passes in full suite (35/35). **Real behavior proof (P2-level):** ```bash # TypeScript compile: only pre-existing attempt.test.ts error (unrelated, already on main) node --max-old-space-size=8192 node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit # → src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/attempt.test.ts(178,20): error TS2352 [pre-existing] # All 35 e2e tests pass npx vitest run "agent-runner.runreplyagent" --config test/vitest/vitest.e2e.config.ts --reporter=dot # → Tests 35 passed (35) ``` **ackMaxChars threading verification:** With `agentId=undefined` (no per-agent override), `heartbeatAckMaxChars` resolves to `cfg.agents?.defaults?.heartbeat?.ackMaxChars ?? DEFAULT_HEARTBEAT_ACK_MAX_CHARS = 300`. The 360-char test remainder exceeds 300 → `shouldSkip: false` → persisted. An agent configured with `ackMaxChars: 0` would persist even a single-char remainder. <!-- clawsweeper-command-progress:start --> Re-review progress: - State: Review in progress - Detail: Targeted re-review run started; Codex is reviewing the item. - Run: https://github.com/openclaw/clawsweeper/actions/runs/25541075392 - Updated: 2026-05-08T06:38:18.542Z <!-- clawsweeper-command-progress:end -->
